title: chaenostoma langebergense
intro: Chaenostoma langebergense, also known as the "Langbergia", is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant, traditionally used in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chaenostoma langebergense include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Chaenostoma langebergense include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water.
